name: chr9qh_size_polymorphism
description: 9qh+ / 9qh- size polymorphism: the largest classical autosomal heterochromatin block (9q12), predominantly HSat3, varies dramatically between individuals (5-35 Mb). Detected in routine karyotype as an enlarged 9q12 band (qh+). Mostly benign; weak association with reproductive failure. GRCh38 represents only ~2 Mb of this block; T2T-CHM13 resolves the full ~33 Mb in the reference individual.

architecture.internal_structure: Tandem arrays of HSat3 sub-families (ATTCC pentamer derivatives) with HSat2 patches; the largest classical heterochromatin block in the genome on any autosome.
